title: build helper
description: Adds utility items like dimensional keys, night vision goggles, and a custom superflat dimension for enhanced survival and creative gameplay.  And a magic dimension and dungeon for the how want a littel bit of adventure and magic
body:
# 🛠️ Build Helper - Utility Modpack

Take your building skills to the next level — whether you're in Creative or Survival mode!

This lightweight modpack is designed for builders and technical players who want to streamline their building experience with powerful utilities, without cluttering the game with decorative blocks.

## ✅ Features:

- **Precision building** with tools like **WorldEdit** and **Create** for automation and structure design.

- **Performance boosts** with mods like **ImmediatelyFast** and **LazyDFU**, keeping your game smooth even with complex builds.

- **Useful overlays and information** with **Jade** and **Embeddium** for better interaction with the world.

- **Enhanced parkour and movement** with **ParCool** — perfect for testing and designing maps.

- **Full mod compatibility** with **Oculus** for shaders and **Kotlin** for Forge support.

- **Survival QoL tools like Utility:** The Magic of Comfort, enhancing gameplay while staying lightweight.

## ✨ Shader Support:
This modpack comes ready for shader support via **Oculus**, and is fully compatible with **Complementary Shaders (Unbound)** — giving you beautiful lighting, shadows, and atmosphere to make your builds even more immersive.

## 🔧 Ideal For:

- Creative world builders

- Redstone & automation enthusiasts

- Map makers

- Players who want utility over aesthetics

🧩 No decorative blocks added — just tools, optimizations, and building enhancements.

### ✨ Need help or want the latest news? Join our **[Discord community](https://discord.gg/BXxRvyurTG)** for support, updates, and fun!
